templates.name: Evidence request letter
templates.description: Request evidence from a third party such as a GP, consultant, or employer.

fields.label: Recipient name
fields.hint: The name of the person or organisation you are writing to.

fields.label: What evidence are you requesting?
fields.hint: For example, 'a medical report covering the applicant's mobility limitations'.

templates.body:
Dear {{recipient-name}},

Re: {{applicantName}} — {{benefitType}} review (reference {{caseId}})

We are reviewing a decision about {{applicantName}}'s {{benefitType}}. To help us make a fair decision, we need the following evidence:

{{evidence-type}}

Please send this to us by {{response-deadline}}. If you cannot provide this information by that date, please contact us to let us know.

You can send your response to:

Benefit Review Team
Department for Work and Pensions
PO Box 1234
London
WC1A 1AA

Or by email to: benefit.reviews@dwp.example.gov.uk

Thank you for your help.

Yours sincerely,

{{caseworkerName}}
Benefit Review Team
Department for Work and Pensions

templates.name: Evidence chasing letter
templates.description: Follow up on an evidence request that has not been returned by the expected date.
templates.body:
Dear {{recipient-name}},

Re: {{applicantName}} — {{benefitType}} review (reference {{caseId}})

We wrote to you on {{original-request-date}} asking for the following evidence:

{{evidence-type}}

We have not yet received a response. This information is important to help us make a fair decision about {{applicantName}}'s benefit.

Please send this to us by {{new-deadline}}. If you are unable to provide this information, please contact us to discuss alternatives.

If we do not receive a response, we will need to make a decision based on the evidence we already have.

Yours sincerely,

{{caseworkerName}}
Benefit Review Team
Department for Work and Pensions

templates.name: Applicant update letter
templates.description: Update the applicant on the progress of their case.

fields.label: What update do you want to give?
fields.hint: For example, 'We are still waiting for a medical report from your GP.'

fields.label: What happens next?
fields.hint: For example, 'We expect to make a decision within 4 weeks.'

templates.body:
Dear {{applicantName}},

Re: Your {{benefitType}} review (reference {{caseId}})

We are writing to update you on your case.

{{update-detail}}

{{expected-next-step}}

If you have any questions, you can contact us at:

Phone: 0800 123 4567
Email: benefit.reviews@dwp.example.gov.uk

Yours sincerely,

{{caseworkerName}}
Benefit Review Team
Department for Work and Pensions

templates.name: Decision notice
templates.description: The formal decision notice sent to the applicant after a decision has been made. This is auto-generated from the decision template.

fields.label: Decision outcome
fields.hint: This is populated from the decision template.

fields.label: Decision reasoning
fields.hint: This is populated from the decision template.

fields.label: New award details (if revised)
fields.hint: For example, 'Standard rate mobility component, £28.70 per week, from 16 April 2026.'

templates.name: Representative notification
templates.description: Notify the applicant's representative of a decision or case update.

fields.label: What are you notifying the representative about?
fields.hint: For example, 'A decision has been made on your client's case.'

templates.body:
Dear {{representativeName}},

Re: {{applicantName}} — {{benefitType}} review (reference {{caseId}})
Your reference: {{representativeReference}}

{{notification-detail}}

A copy of the decision notice has been sent to your client.

If you have any questions, you can contact us at:

Phone: 0800 123 4567
Email: benefit.reviews@dwp.example.gov.uk

Yours sincerely,

{{caseworkerName}}
Benefit Review Team
Department for Work and Pensions
